name: The Deep Current
description: A broad Atlantean religious tradition centered around the belief that all life is carried by sacred currents and eventually returns to the sea.
coreBeliefs: All souls are carried by the tide
Death is a return, not an ending
Community protects the current of life
rituals: Memorial offerings in the Coral Gardens
dmSecret: Some older hymns contain phrases that predate modern Atlantis and may reference the pre-Atlantean ruin beneath the Drowned Ward.

name: Bahamut Worship
description: Worship of Bahamut exists throughout both the Surface Realm and Atlantis, especially among paladins, protectors, and lawful guardians.
dmSecret: Bahamut clergy may eventually question whether Atlantis's pursuit of order has drifted away from justice.

name: Valkur Worship
description: Valkur is commonly honored by sailors, navigators, fishermen, and storm survivors across the Surface Realm.
coreBeliefs: Freedom belongs to those who brave the waves
dmSecret: Some surface prayers to Valkur contain warnings about lights beneath the sea.

name: Umberlee Worship
description: Umberlee is feared by many surface sailors who make offerings to avoid storms, wrecks, and drowning.
coreBeliefs: The sea takes what it is owed
rituals: Funeral rites for those lost at sea
dmSecret: Certain extremist sects may interpret disasters as divine payment.

name: The Sleeper Below
description: A forbidden belief centered around an ancient abyssal entity said to dream beneath the deepest trench.
dmSecret: The Sleeper Below may be tied to ancient pre-Atlantean ruins and the deepest layers of the campaign's final mystery.

name: Ocean Spirit Traditions
description: A loose collection of folk beliefs honoring local currents, reefs, whale spirits, storm spirits, and ancestral guardians.
coreBeliefs: Reefs protect those who respect them
The dead may guide the living through dreams
dmSecret: Some spirits may actually be magical echoes left behind by ancient civilization.
